OWNERSHIP DEED

Property: Menara Demo, 12 Jalan Demo, Seksyen 7, 40000 Shah Alam, Selangor, Malaysia
Owner: Ahmad bin Tan (NRIC 850101-14-5678)
Title No: HSD 12345, Lot 678, Mukim Damansara
Issued: 15 March 2024 by Pejabat Tanah dan Galian Selangor

This deed certifies that the above-named owner holds freehold title to the
property described above as of the issue date. Valid as proof of ownership
for all statutory and municipal purposes.

Registrar, Pejabat Tanah dan Galian Selangor
Seal / Signature: [OFFICIAL SEAL]
